sizing_rule.note: Use dynamic fractional f (not static f) for multi-subaccount allocation. Reallocate between active/inactive subaccounts with minimal frequency to optimize long-run performance. Exact optimal f value and Kelly fraction not specified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Use dynamic fractional f approach to asset allocation and reallocate funds between active and inactive subaccounts as infrequently as possible to optimize long-run performance.
